title: Add attr declarations to a function component
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/components/core_components/badge.ex (module MyAppWeb.CoreComponents.Badge) that defines a function component badge/1. The component takes attrs :label (string, required), :variant (string, default "info"), :rest (:global). It renders {@label}. Use Phoenix.Component and ~H.
tier_rationale: Single component with known attr pattern. attr/slot declarations are part of the canonical Phoenix.Component idiom.
research_citation: Phoenix.Component docs — compiler validates slot/attr at compile time
